nerdctl build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.34.3 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.3 --platform=linux/<ARCH> -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
nerdctl push --platform=linux/<ARCH> image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.3
nerdctl build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.33.12 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.33.12 --platform=linux/<ARCH> -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
nerdctl push --platform=linux/<ARCH> image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.33.12
nerdctl build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.32.13 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.32.13 --platform=linux/<ARCH> -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
nerdctl push --platform=linux/<ARCH> image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.32.13
